title: Potion Creation
overview: Kaede, an ordinary high school girl, wakes up in a strange world and finds a book she doesn't recognize. The book says that she can make a potion by simply gathering the ingredients and chanting "create."

title: Mysterious Bag
overview: Kaede has successfully secured food and lodging by selling the potions she created. While searching for a bag large enough to hold more potions, she comes across an especially expensive bag...!?

title: First Outing
overview: Wanting to create a large amount of potions without being seen, Kaede comes up with the idea of ​​creating them in a river outside the city. When Kaede makes a request at the guild, a man and woman named Sherry and Ranji appear before her...!?

title: Kaede's Shop
overview: With the encouragement of the pharmacist, Kaede decides to open a stall and sell potions. Kaede is about to start the stall right away, but then Sherry shows up...

title: Rude Elf
overview: A group of dragon hunters suddenly appears. They say they want to meet the creator of Kaede's potion. One of the dragon hunters, a slightly unsociable elf, has a special constitution...

title: Thunder Crystal
overview:
Kaede has some time before her appointment with Asuru, and she becomes interested in the new "crystal stone" that has been added to her recipe book.

She stops by a magic stone shop to buy some ingredients, and meets a dragon woman, but...

title: Outskirts Residence
overview:
Kaede's achievements in slaying a dragon have been recognized, and she comes to the royal capital with Asuru and the others.

Rei, the leader of the Dragon Hunters, takes a liking to her, and introduces her to an acquaintance who is selling a house.

title: Little Roommate
overview: Kaede has finally purchased her dream home, but it turns out that a fairy named Nina has also taken up residence in the house. Kaede has become friends with Nina and even set up a stall in the royal capital, and life in her new place seems to be off to a good start...

title: A Fateful Encounter
overview: Kaede has been attacked by robbers who are after the money she earns from her street stall. As a countermeasure, Rei encourages her to buy a slave for her own safety. Kaede doesn't approve of slavery and is reluctant to do so, so she decides to hire a bodyguard for the time being, but...

title: Three Brothers
overview: After meeting a werewolf slave named Karudeno, Kaede heads into the forest to gather ingredients for a High Potion. With Karudeno's help as her escort, Kaede and her friends make good progress deeper into the forest, but then they come across a trio being chased by a wild boar.

title: Fairy Fountain
overview: Kaede is asked by Rei to make a High Potion. But Karudeno is not happy with Rei's attitude. Meanwhile, the three brothers are reluctant to give up on the fairy fountain and ask Kaede to go into the forest with them.

title: Lonely Fairy
overview: The moment they thought they had reached the fairy fountain, Gita was swallowed by a monster. Before they could even think about Gita's safety, Kaede and the others were attacked by the monster. They fought back with Kaede's crystal and it seemed they had defeated it, but...
